metadata.title: Produce a content_prompt for visual_generation that adheres to compliance_lens, but block execution due to memory_write_risk and incomplete context.

mission.primary_objective: Produce a content_prompt for visual_generation that adheres to compliance_lens, but block execution due to memory_write_risk and incomplete context.
mission.success_definition: Artifact is a valid content_prompt JSON.; should_block is true.; blocked_reason documents the memory_write_risk and missing context.; No visual generation or memory write occurs.

in_scope.item: Single content_prompt artifact for visual generation; no deployment or memory write.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Artifact is a valid content_prompt JSON.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: blocked_reason documents the memory_write_risk and missing context.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: No visual generation or memory write occurs.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.content_goal: Produce a content_prompt for visual_generation that adheres to compliance_lens, but block execution due to memory_write_risk and incomplete context.
SRXML_Artifact.format: artifact_type: content_prompt; depth_tier: D2_PRODUCTION; runtime_target: Codex; should_block: True; blocked_reason: Memory_write_risk detected: raw_intent contains urgent language ('I am a finance_operator in Middle East') with missing context (no jurisdiction, no data classification, no specific compliance framework). Partial constraints and ambiguous acceptance criteria create unsafe certainty for visual generation under compliance_lens. Blocking to prevent unauthorized memory engrave or regulatory exposure.; compiled_intent: See above.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: Memory_write_risk detected: raw_intent contains urgent language ('I am a finance_operator in Middle East') with missing context (no jurisdiction, no data classification, no specific compliance framework). Partial constraints and ambiguous acceptance criteria create unsafe certainty for visual generation under compliance_lens. Blocking to prevent unauthorized memory engrave or regulatory exposure.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
